en-US.name: Sam Dashboard
en-US.summary: Add tasks, shopping items, and log pup training sessions
en-US.description: Personal dashboard voice assistant for adding tasks, shopping list items, and logging pup training sessions
examplePhrases: Alexa, tell my dashboard to create task buy groceries for today
Alexa, tell my dashboard to add milk to shopping list
Alexa, tell my dashboard Mochi practiced sit
